channel.title: freedns on My Blog - For Fun
channel.description: Recent content in freedns on My Blog - For Fun

item.title: How to Install Freedns Go on Vyos
item.description: #Switch to root mode sudo su #Define freedns version freedns_version=v2020.9.17 #Create dcompass temp folder sudo mkdir -p /tmp/freedns # Swich to folder just we created. cd /tmp/freedns #Download dcompass binary sudo curl -fsSLO "https://github.com/tuna/freedns-go/releases/download/$freedns_version/freedns-go-linux-amd64" sudo cp -af /tmp/freedns/freedns-go-linux-amd64 /usr/local/bin/freedns sudo chown root:root /usr/local/bin/freedns sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/freedns sudo bash -c 'cat > /lib/systemd/system/freedns.service' << EOF [Unit] Description=freedns service [Service] ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/freedns -f 114.114.114.114:53 -c 8.8.8.8:53 -l 127.0.0.3:53 Restart=on-failure RestartSec=42s [Install] WantedBy=multi-user.
